mapper.sql: id, user_id, type, title, content, related_id, is_read, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_notification (user_id, type, title, content, related_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{relatedId})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE sys_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 1
